# MCP MVP PR Template

PR Template MCP MVP

What this PR does
- Provide a concise summary of changes related to the MVP sprint goals.

Why this matters for the MVP sprint
- Aligns with Plan: Scene atomicity, TTL cleanup, timeline guard, onboarding, not-found UX.

What changed (high level)
- List files touched and modules affected
- If this PR is part of a larger epic, reference the epic (#116 MVP Sprint Plan)

How to verify
- Steps to reproduce and verify changes
- Include test commands

Acceptance criteria
- The changes meet the MVP acceptance criteria described in #116
- Tests pass in CI

Notes for reviewers
- Any caveats or blockers
